prompts.prompt:
Wide establishing shot of Mira's bedroom. Single window with gauze curtains (camera-left). Wooden bedside table with phone (face-down), small clock, and a single potted succulent in a clay pot. Bed with cream-toned linens. Tree-leaf shadows occasionally play across the opposite wall. Wall paint: warm pale cream. Floor: pale wood. No people, no figures in the bed.
.

LIGHTING: warm dawn light from camera-left and slightly above, soft window-diffused with gentle warm bounce on shadow side, color temperature ~3200K, slight atmospheric haze (dust motes catching light), high-key exposure with 200-250 brightness range.

STYLE: soft pen-and-ink linework, variable line weight 0.5-1.2px, warm uneven hand-inked aesthetic, not vector-perfect, soft watercolor wash with gentle 2-4px edge bleed, painterly continuity, no hard cel-shading, low tonal density, breathable negative space, no heavy hatching, no dense screentone, gentle shading, low contrast, value range 180-240 on light skin, no dramatic chiaroscuro.

COMPOSITION: leave generous empty space at upper-third (where character may sit up) or center-frame (bed shape) of the frame for subject placement. bedside table at lower-left third, window with curtains right of frame, succulent visible on table 

GENRE TRADITION: iyashikei watercolor register, painterly continuity, Yokohama Kaidashi Kiko aesthetic.



Portrait orientation 1080x1920.
prompts.negative_prompt: people, person, character, human, figure, named characters, faces, hands, body parts, kettle, cup, kitchen items, multiple people, named characters, text, words, letters, watermark, signature, signs, writing, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, blurry, bad anatomy, no speed lines, no dutch angles, no exaggerated reactions, no sweatdrops, no concentration lines, harsh contrast, busy composition, cluttered
